flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Murray State College are 4% below the public associate's-predominant peer median ($36.5k vs $38.2k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 29% at Murray State College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (1.5k vs 2.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Murray State College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Murray State College rose 16% between 2006 and 2009 (2.2k → 2.6k).
